title: ICanGamez Parkour
description:
This adds a bunch of new vanilla ways to parkour around places!
Vanilla friendly
body:
# ICanGamez Parkour

This Adds 5 New Ways to Parkour around your maps you make!

<details>
<summary>The ways of Parkour</summary>

Rope Climb: Walk up to Oak Fence

Slime Jump: Crouch and Jump on slime

Power Jump: Crouch and Hold to jump higher

Double Jump: Jump over 2 block steep pits

Wall Run: Run and keep running until you run against a stripped bamboo log



</details>

<details>
<summary>Enabling the Parkour Ways</summary>

Run Command: /function parkor:menu

</details>


<details>
<summary>Can you use in other Builds?</summary>

Yes! Use Free as long as its credited in you modification!

</details>
